positive: Minimalist flat design illustration of a geometric mountain range viewed through abstract pastel shapes. Clean vector art, Matisse-inspired cut-out style, limited color palette (sage green, peach, terracotta), negative space utilized effectively, perfect for modern home decor.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, shadows, clutter
